videos.title: Fable 5 is here—but who is it for? #ai #anthropic #shorts
videos.description:
Is Fable 5 AI actually worth the hype for your daily workflow? 

I'll be posting a full deep dive on Saturday where I'll break down the capabilities of this new model to see if it truly handles complex, time-consuming projects or if it is just more noise. If you are debating whether to integrate this tech into your professional stack, this review is for you.

Let me know in the comments if you have found a real use case for Fable 5 yet.

videos.title: Fable 5 Raises the Bar for AI Ambition
videos.description:
Anthropic’s Fable 5 is a major leap in frontier AI, but the bigger shift is what it asks of users: less prompting for small tasks, more imagination about what can now be delegated to agents for hours or days at a time. In the headlines: Fable’s guardrails spark backlash, enterprise retention concerns emerge, and OpenAI hints it may have an answer coming.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news and discussions in AI. 
Subscribe to the podcast version of The AI Daily Brief

videos.title: OpenAI Declares the Next Phase of AI
videos.description: OpenAI filed confidential IPO paperwork and released a strategy declaring a new phase centered on automating AI research, creating personal AGI, and spreading economic gains. SpaceX unveiled designs for space-based data centers and aggressive scale targets while chipmakers turn to Intel amid TSMC capacity constraints. Fable 5 (aka Mythos 5 with guardrails) is here and the numbers are impressive, even if the pricing will scares you a little bit.

From today through June 22, Fable 5 is included on Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise plans at no extra cost.
